data.current_summary: Get all fulfilment options for a SKU / basket of SKUs
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate basket prices and fulfillment options
data.description_suggestion: Calculates prices for a basket of items, applies basket-level promotions and coupon codes, and retrieves available fulfillment options. Accepts a basket request containing line items, coupon codes, and fulfillment preferences. Returns a calculated basket response with itemized pricing, applied promotions, unused coupons, and available fulfillment options. This operation performs price calculation and promotion evaluation for the provided basket.
data.reasoning: Original summary mentions 'Get' (retrieval) but operation performs calculation and state evaluation. Description is completely missing. Added clarity about what the operation does (calculates prices, applies promotions, retrieves fulfillment options), what inputs are expected (basket with items, coupons, fulfillment preferences), what is returned (calculated basket with pricing and promotions), and the side effect of promotion evaluation. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_summary: Retrieve previously calculated basket prices by Id
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a previously calculated basket with its pricing, promotions, and fulfillment options using the CalculatedBasketId. Returns the complete calculated basket response including line items with pricing, applied promotions, unused coupons, and available fulfillment options. Use this operation to fetch basket calculation results after an initial calculation.
